name: Weather/Storm Automation
description: Monitors NOAA alerts for Treasure Coast zones. On watch/warning, dispatches pre-storm service notifications to active clients and auto-books post-storm inspections.

config.note: Polls NOAA API for active alerts in monitored zones

params.event: Hurricane Warning,Hurricane Watch,Tropical Storm Warning,Tropical Storm Watch,Storm Surge Warning,Flood Warning

config.description: Parse NOAA alerts and map to service zones
config.code: const alerts = JSON.parse(inputData.response).features || []; const zoneMap = { FLZ060: ['Vero Beach', 'Sebastian'], FLZ061: ['Fort Pierce', 'Port Saint Lucie'], FLZ062: ['Jensen Beach', 'Palm City', 'Stuart', 'Hobe Sound'], FLZ063: ['Jupiter', 'North Palm Beach'] }; const activeAlerts = alerts.map(a => ({ event: a.properties.event, severity: a.properties.severity, zones: (a.properties.geocode?.UGC || []).filter(z => zoneMap[z]).flatMap(z => zoneMap[z]), onset: a.properties.onset, expires: a.properties.expires })).filter(a => a.zones.length > 0); output = { has_alerts: activeAlerts.length > 0, alerts: activeAlerts, affected_zones: [...new Set(activeAlerts.flatMap(a => a.zones))] };

config.description: Find active clients in affected service zones

payload.prompt: Generate a pre-storm client advisory for the following zones: {{step2.affected_zones}}. Alert type: {{step2.alerts[0].event}}. Include pre-storm service availability at $295/event and post-storm inspection at $500/event. Close with property risk frame.

config.subject: Coastal Key Storm Advisory - {{step2.alerts[0].event}} - Action Required

config.message: STORM ALERT ACTIVATED | {{step2.alerts[0].event}} | Zones: {{step2.affected_zones}} | {{step4.total}} clients notified | Pre-storm + post-storm services queued
